name: ExtensionArtifactAssessment_Content
title: R5: Comment, classifier, or rating content (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ArtifactAssessment.content` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ArtifactAssessment.content` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ArtifactAssessment.content` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: What the comment is directed to (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content.path` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ArtifactAssessment.content` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content.path` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content.path` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The target element is used to point the comment to aspect of the artifact, such as a text range within a CQL library (e.g. #content?0:0-120:80).
